dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HRES 311 EH: Dismissing the election contest relating to the office of Representative from the Thirtieth Congressional District of Texas.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
form.official-title: Dismissing the election contest relating to the office of Representative from the Thirtieth Congressional District of Texas.

section.text: That the election contest relating to the office of Representative from the Thirtieth Congressional District of Texas is dismissed on the grounds of untimely filing with the House of Representatives.
